title: Runtime Identity Resolution Implementation Package
repository_truth: The inspected continuation pipeline does not currently perform runtime identity resolution before determining RuntimeState.

execution_assessment.gap: Runtime identity is not resolved prior to RuntimeState publication.

recommended_evolution.purpose: Resolve authenticated identity before RuntimeState publication while preserving existing continuation and navigation responsibilities.

founder_decision.decision: Authorize bounded implementation of Runtime Identity Resolution.
founder_decision.objective: Introduce runtime identity resolution between continuation and navigation while preserving existing architectural responsibilities.
